  • Articles
    • Fitting an antibody landscape

Reference

All functions

ablandscape()

Fitting with antibody landscapes

ablandscape.control()

Get defaults for antibody landscape fitting

ablandscape.delta.fit()

Fitting an antibody delta landscape

ablandscape.fit()

Fitting with antibody landscapes

ablandscape.par()

Get defaults for antibody landscape plotting

ablandscapes

ablandscapes: Making Antibody-landscapes Using R

as.logtiter()

Convert raw titers to log titers

build_lndscp()

Build an antibody landscape

calc_mean_titer_negll()

Calculate the total negative log-likelihood of a mean titer

calc_mean_titer_negll_without_sd()

Calculate the total negative log-likelihood of a mean titer where the standard deviation is unknown. This is an internal function used by the function mean_titer.

calc_titer_diffs()

Get titer differences

calc_titer_lims()

Get titer limits

calc_titer_loglik()

Calculate log likelihood of single fitted HI titer

calc_titer_set_negll()

Calculate the total negative log-likelihood of a predicted titer set

fit_ci2coords()

Get landscape confidence interval

fit_height2point()

Fit landscape to single coordinate point

fit_lndscp2coords()

Fit landscape to a set of coordinates

fit_lndscp2point()

Fit landscape to single coordinate point

h3coords2015

Antigenic coordinates of H3N2 influenza strains.

lndscp3d_map()

Generate a 3D map plot for an antibody landscape

lndscp3d_surface()

Add a surface to a 3d landscape plot

lndscp3d_titres()

Add titer impulses to a 3d landscape plot

lndscp_checkChull()

Check if coordinates are within convex hull of ag coordinates

logfoldchange.mean()

Function for calculating the mean foldchange from a group of titers

logtiter.mean()

Calculate the geometric mean titer

mean_fromlims()

Calculate maximum likelihood mean from measurement limits

model_lndscp_height()

Function to model the landscape height

predict(<ablandscape.fit>)

Predict method for antibody landscapes

rcpp_hello_world()

Simple function using Rcpp

tricubic.weights()

Calculate the antigen weights

view()

View objects interactively

view(<ablandscape>)

View method for the antibody landscape object
